summary: Full 3-way match on high-value freight invoice. All four lines match PO-2025-7007 and GRN-7007-A exactly. Critical alert: invoice offers 2% early payment discount (SEK 2,942.50 savings) if paid within 5 business days by 2025-01-31. At today's EUR/SEK rate, discount is worth approximately USD 260. Full payment SEK 147,125.00 due 2025-02-10 if discount window missed.
